globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 crisp 32x32 inventory pixel art; binary alpha; top-left light; hard clusters.
globalNegativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, antialiasing, gradients, noise dithering, soft glow, watermark, logo, text, copied game art
globalRequirements: Export exact 32x32 manifest dimensions with two transparent edge pixels.
Preserve distinct silhouettes for both magic weapons, the tool and the accessory.
Keep every icon readable at native scale and in a 16-pixel inventory slot.

briefs.subject: Charred amberwood fire staff with copper bands and a contained cinder blossom
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 32x32 inventory weapon: a strong rising diagonal charred staff, copper collar and compact red-gold cinder blossom head. Continuous dark outline, restrained three-quarter view, no glow outside the silhouette.
briefs.negativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, antialiasing, gradient, soft aura, text, logo, watermark, copied game art
requirements: At least two transparent pixels on every edge.

briefs.subject: Upright silver-blue scepter crowned by a forked frostglass crystal
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 32x32 inventory weapon: mostly upright silver-blue scepter with a forked angular frostglass crown and compact mana core. Continuous dark outline, hard crystal facets, no soft glow.
briefs.negativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, antialiasing, gradient, soft aura, text, logo, watermark, copied game art
requirements: At least two transparent pixels on every edge.

briefs.subject: Heavy deep-delving pickaxe with amberstone core and iron beak
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 32x32 inventory tool: a broad iron pick head on a strong descending wood handle, reinforced by a bright contained amberstone core. Continuous dark outline and immediately readable mining silhouette.
briefs.negativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, antialiasing, gradient, text, logo, watermark, copied game art
requirements: At least two transparent pixels on every edge.

briefs.subject: Round copper surveyor compass charm with teal cardinal needle
briefs.prompt: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 32x32 inventory accessory: a round copper-rimmed wayfinder compass with hanging loop, dark inset dial and crisp teal-gold cardinal needle. Continuous dark outline and centered icon silhouette.
briefs.negativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, antialiasing, gradient, text labels, logo, watermark, copied game art
requirements: At least two transparent pixels on every edge.
